innovation_1.name: 基于三层角信号分解与几何特征的光场材质感知机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that light field spatial-angular signals inherently entangle material properties and geometric features, which limits the generalization of traditional depth estimation models across diverse domains.

innovation_2.name: 基于双掩码路由与领域平衡采样的统一光场深度估计框架
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a synergistic approach combining a three-layer angular signal decomposition mechanism for material perception with a unified depth estimation framework driven by dual-mask routing and domain-balanced sampling.
